title: cakile aegyptia var. littoralis
intro: Cakile aegyptia var. littoralis, also known as sea rocket, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae, native to the Mediterranean coastal regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cakile aegyptia var. littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
